title: Voyage to the Kingdom of the Sea Mice
summary: A submersible carries a crew of familiar friends and adventurous explorers deep into the ocean's depths. Their mission: to reach the legendary Kingdom of the Sea Mice. Along the way, they navigate past the sunlit upper waters into the cold, dark abyss, encountering a grumpy, sleepy anglerfish and spotting mysterious sea stuff through the portholes. With new captains taking the helm and cats joining the crew, the voyage becomes a discovery of the unknown wonders of the deep.

highlightQuote.text: I see, I see a big anglerfishy!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: two, because this, this submarine, submersible is big enough for everyone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. said Mickey and Minnie and more will come aboard too.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Where are we going?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We're just going, I don't know, maybe we're going to, we're going to the bottom of the sea to see where the Kingdom of the Sea Mice live.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The Kingdom of the Sea Mice! That sounds amazing. I wonder what they are doing, how they- what they do down there on the bottom of the ocean.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dive! Dive!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Dive, dive, dive! We're going down into the deep, deep dark.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so, Captain Izzy steered the submersible down under the water, through...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: ...the sunlit zone of blue bright sparkling water lit by the sun and down deeper and deeper and the water got a little darker and a little colder. And did we see some fish swimming by?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What do you see, Captain Izzy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I see, I see a big anglerfishy!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my gosh, what was that sound?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was anglerfish. That was- I saw an anglerfish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh! Hello, Anglerfish.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hello, everyone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Would you like to come with us on our underwater mission to the Kingdom of the Sea Mice?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what are you up to, Anglerfish?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm up to sleeping.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. We won't bother you too much then.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well, what were you making some noise inside of your submarine? I don't want you to make any noise in your submarine.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Well, we'll just, we'll just keep driving our submarine down further into the deep and we'll leave you alone, Anglerfish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so the submarine kept diving deeper and deeper and deeper.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then we looked out the porthole and Mickey saw something... Oh my gosh, what's that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mickey... um, I already looked out my window and then but now Lottie is the driver.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Lottie is steering the ship. Okay.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now Lottie's- and she looked out her window.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, what do you see out there, Lottie?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I see... I spy something... that Captain... I spy some... some something out my window. ... Now I see some... oh, do you see that sea stuff? Now do you see that sea stuff out there?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I do, says Daddy. There's lots of different things under the ocean to look at. What do you notice, Lottie?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know. Oh! I'll hop into the Captain's chair! Hop, hop, hop!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay Lottie, you can hop right up.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mmm... Jackie?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mhm.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, can we make some dividing things in our submarine to use?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Some dividing things? What do those do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know. Can you make them and then we can find out? Remember that?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay. Good idea.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I show my camera where the space to go.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, it does.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But right now it's not on.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. Silvercat, you came on the submarine with us.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Welcome to the deep ocean exploration mission that we're on.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey, that's not Silver, that's Finn.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, that's Finncat.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He is...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: ...lying down.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So he's flopped.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: He sure is.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

characters.name: Captain Izzy
characters.description: A determined space explorer and brilliant researcher, this confident commander leads her mission into the stars with absolute authority. A master pilot of both spacecraft and deep-sea submersibles, she navigates glittering heavens and crushing depths with unerring precision. Her tireless quest to collect alien artifacts remains fueled by a singular, inquisitive goal: finding playmates across the universe.

characters.name: Anglerfish
characters.description: A cantankerous lurker of the sunless depths, this creature guards his silence with a perpetual scowl, craving only the stillness of a long slumber. Yet, beneath his prickly veneer lies a well-meaning mischief-maker who frequently shatters the very quiet he seeks, playfully toppling artifacts with a flick of his fins before retreating back into his grumpy solitude.

characters.name: Lottie
characters.description: A member of the crew who takes over as the driver and spies mysterious things out the window.

characters.name: Jackie
characters.description: A figure mentioned as the crew prepares new tools.

characters.name: Silvercat
characters.description: A seafaring resident of Kibble World, this feline explorer bridges the gap between the sun-drenched feasts of her homeland and the crushing silence of the abyss. Known for her hospitality, she invites visitors to partake in an overflowing bounty of kibble before leading her deep ocean exploration mission into the uncharted mysteries of the sea floor.

characters.name: Finn
characters.description: A resident of Cat World and loyal companion to Mama, Finncat is a meticulous research collector who documents the world through investigative sniffing. Alongside their peer Silver, they navigate their domain with scholarly curiosity, often pausing mid-voyage for a sudden, dramatic flop. While currently thwarted by the formidable challenge of an unopened food can, this diligent scholar occasionally graces the room for a fleeting minute during storytelling, lending a brief, discerning presence to the narrative before returning to their investigations.

characters.name: Sea Mice
characters.description: Tiny and mysterious, these aquatic denizens inhabit a sovereign kingdom anchored to the crushing depths of the absolute ocean floor.

places.name: Submersible
places.description: The large vessel capable of taking everyone on an underwater mission.

places.name: Sunlit Zone
places.description: The bright, sparkling blue upper layer of the ocean lit by the sun.

places.name: Kingdom of the Sea Mice
places.description: A mysterious realm and the ultimate destination, hidden within the crushing silence of the absolute ocean floor.

places.name: The Deep Dark
places.description: The cold and lightless part of the ocean where deep-sea creatures reside.
